--- title: "New features of
rtauargus" subtitle: "a step further in the automation of the analysis" institute: Insee author: Clara Baudry date: today date-format: "DD/MM/YYYY" description: | template de support de présentation interactif intégrant la charte graphique de l'Insee slide-tone: false # for blind readers chalkboard: false # press the B key to toggle chalkboard jump-to-slide: true #press "g" to jump and the number of slide mouse-wheel: false transition: slide # multiplex: true embed-resources: false custom-toc: true editor: render-on-save: true params: annee: "2023" codeDepartement: "87" codeRegion: "75" typeEquipement: "G103" --- # Recap on the analysis of a publication {#chapters_1 .backgroundTitre_bleu} ## Titre transparent {#section_0_8 .backgroundStandard .titreTransparent .unnumbered data-menu-title="Slide sans titre ni numérotation" visibility="uncounted"} :::{.enteteAvecTitre} Recap on the analysis of a publication ::: ![Table protection workflow](img/auto_analysis_workflow.png) ## Importing Eurostat template for EBSBDS[^1] ✍️ {#section_1_1 .backgroundStandard_bleu} :::{.enteteAvecTitre} Recap on the analysis of a publication ::: - ✍️ Manual steps with R - ⚙️ Package functions ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(dplyr) library(rtauargus) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} template_EBSBDS <- read.csv2("./metadata/EBSBDS_ALL_A_FR.csv") head(template_EBSBDS) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` FREQ REF_AREA TABLENAME INDICATOR ACTIVITY NUMBER_EMPL LEGAL_FORM 1 A FR T11 EMPL B E0 _T 2 A FR T11 EMPL B E1T4 _T 3 A FR T11 EMPL B E5T9 _T 4 A FR T11 EMPL B EGE10 _T 5 A FR T11 EMPL B _T LL 6 A FR T11 EMPL B _T PA SURVIVAL_AGE TIME_PERIOD OBS_VALUE UNIT_MEASURE UNIT_MULT DECIMALS OBS_STATUS 1 _Z 2022 78 PN 0 0 B 2 _Z 2022 591 PN 0 0 B 3 _Z 2022 1104 PN 0 0 B 4 _Z 2022 16596 PN 0 0 B 5 _Z 2022 18121 PN 0 0 B 6 _Z 2022 92 PN 0 0 B OBS_STATUS_1 CONF_STATUS CONF_STATUS_1 DOMINANCE SHARE_SECOND COMMENT_OBS 1 NA NA NA NA 2 NA NA NA NA 3 NA NA NA NA 4 NA NA NA NA 5 NA NA NA NA 6 NA C O 100 NA NA ``` ::: ::: [^1]: EBSBDS, European Business Statistics - Buisness Demography Statistics. ## Selecting the columns needed for the analysis ✍️ {#section_1_2 .backgroundStandard_bleu} :::{.enteteAvecTitre} Recap on the analysis of a publication ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} sub_template <- template_EBSBDS %>% filter(INDICATOR %in% c("SAL","SAL_DTH")) %>% select(TIME_PERIOD,INDICATOR,ACTIVITY,NUMBER_EMPL,LEGAL_FORM) print(head(sub_template), row.names = FALSE) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` TIME_PERIOD INDICATOR ACTIVITY NUMBER_EMPL LEGAL_FORM 2022 SAL B E0 _T 2022 SAL B E1T4 _T 2022 SAL B E5T9 _T 2022 SAL B EGE10 _T 2022 SAL B _T LL 2022 SAL B _T PA ``` ::: ::: SAL: number of employees SAL_DTH: number of employees in enterprise deaths ## Going from the template to the description of
the published tables ⚙️ {#section_1_3 .backgroundStandard_bleu} :::{.enteteAvecTitre} Recap on the analysis of a publication ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} demo_formatted <- format_template( data = sub_template, indicator_column = "INDICATOR", spanning_var_tot = list( ACTIVITY = "BTSXO_S94", NUMBER_EMPL = "_T", LEGAL_FORM = "_T"), field_columns = c("TIME_PERIOD") ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` treating the field 2021 treating the field 2022 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} demo_formatted$metadata ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` table_name field indicator spanning_1 spanning_2 hrc_spanning_1 1 table_2021_SAL_DTH_1 2021 SAL_DTH ACTIVITY LEGAL_FORM hrc_activity_131 2 table_2021_SAL_DTH_2 2021 SAL_DTH ACTIVITY NUMBER_EMPL hrc_activity_131 3 table_2022_SAL_1 2022 SAL ACTIVITY LEGAL_FORM hrc_activity_131 4 table_2022_SAL_2 2022 SAL ACTIVITY NUMBER_EMPL hrc_activity_131 5 table_2022_SAL_DTH_1 2022 SAL_DTH ACTIVITY LEGAL_FORM hrc_activity_131 6 table_2022_SAL_DTH_2 2022 SAL_DTH ACTIVITY NUMBER_EMPL hrc_activity_131 hrc_spanning_2 1 hrc_legal_form_3 2 hrc_number_empl_4 3 hrc_legal_form_3 4 hrc_number_empl_4 5 hrc_legal_form_3 6 hrc_number_empl_4 ``` ::: ::: The 22 572 rows of the template actually represented 6 tables to publish. ## Adding the hierarchies for field and indicator ✍️ {#section_1_4 .backgroundStandard_bleu} :::{.enteteAvecTitre} Recap on the analysis of a publication ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} metadata_demo <- demo_formatted$metadata %>% mutate(hrc_field = NA, hrc_indicator = NA) head(metadata_demo) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` table_name field indicator spanning_1 spanning_2 hrc_spanning_1 1 table_2021_SAL_DTH_1 2021 SAL_DTH ACTIVITY LEGAL_FORM hrc_activity_131 2 table_2021_SAL_DTH_2 2021 SAL_DTH ACTIVITY NUMBER_EMPL hrc_activity_131 3 table_2022_SAL_1 2022 SAL ACTIVITY LEGAL_FORM hrc_activity_131 4 table_2022_SAL_2 2022 SAL ACTIVITY NUMBER_EMPL hrc_activity_131 5 table_2022_SAL_DTH_1 2022 SAL_DTH ACTIVITY LEGAL_FORM hrc_activity_131 6 table_2022_SAL_DTH_2 2022 SAL_DTH ACTIVITY NUMBER_EMPL hrc_activity_131 hrc_spanning_2 hrc_field hrc_indicator 1 hrc_legal_form_3 NA NA 2 hrc_number_empl_4 NA NA 3 hrc_legal_form_3 NA NA 4 hrc_number_empl_4 NA NA 5 hrc_legal_form_3 NA NA 6 hrc_number_empl_4 NA NA ``` ::: ::: ## Analysing the links between tables ⚙️ {#section_1_5 .backgroundStandard_bleu} :::{.enteteAvecTitre} Recap on the analysis of a publication ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} tables_to_protect <- analyse_metadata( df_metadata = metadata_demo, verbose = FALSE ) tables_to_protect ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` cluster table_name field indicator spanning_1 1 2021.SAL_DTH table_2021_SAL_DTH_1 2021 SAL_DTH HRC_ACTIVITY_131 2 2021.SAL_DTH table_2021_SAL_DTH_2 2021 SAL_DTH HRC_ACTIVITY_131 3 2022.SAL table_2022_SAL_1 2022 SAL HRC_ACTIVITY_131 4 2022.SAL table_2022_SAL_2 2022 SAL HRC_ACTIVITY_131 5 2022.SAL_DTH table_2022_SAL_DTH_1 2022 SAL_DTH HRC_ACTIVITY_131 6 2022.SAL_DTH table_2022_SAL_DTH_2 2022 SAL_DTH HRC_ACTIVITY_131 spanning_2 hrc_spanning_1 hrc_spanning_2 1 HRC_LEGAL_FORM_3 hrc_activity_131 hrc_legal_form_3 2 HRC_NUMBER_EMPL_4 hrc_activity_131 hrc_number_empl_4 3 HRC_LEGAL_FORM_3 hrc_activity_131 hrc_legal_form_3 4 HRC_NUMBER_EMPL_4 hrc_activity_131 hrc_number_empl_4 5 HRC_LEGAL_FORM_3 hrc_activity_131 hrc_legal_form_3 6 HRC_NUMBER_EMPL_4 hrc_activity_131 hrc_number_empl_4 ``` ::: ::: The analysis shows that 6 tables need to be protected in 3 different clusters. # New features of rtauargus {#chapters_2 .backgroundTitre_violet} ## New features {#section_2_1 .backgroundStandard_bleu} :::{.enteteAvecTitre} New features of rtauargus ::: New parameter added to `analyse_metadata()` allowing the user to specify links between response variables (version [1.3.2](https://github.com/InseeFrLab/rtauargus/releases/tag/v-1.3.2)). Fix bug due to encoding, french months with accents such as "Décembre" or "Février" (version [1.3.3](https://github.com/InseeFrLab/rtauargus/releases/tag/v-1.3.3)). ## Example of links between response variables {#section_2_2 .backgroundStandard_bleu} :::{.enteteAvecTitre} New features of rtauargus ::: ::: {.columns} ::: {.column width="33%"} **Table 1. Active enterprises** +------------+-----+-----+-------+ | | 0–9 | 10+ | Total | +============+=====+=====+=======+ | **North** | 120 | 30 | 150 | +------------+-----+-----+-------+ | **South** | 100 | 23 | 123 | +------------+-----+-----+-------+ | **Total** | 220 | 53 | 273 | +------------+-----+-----+-------+ ::: ::: {.column width="33%"} **Table 2. Enterprise births** | | 0–9 | 10+ | Total | |--------|-----|-----|-------| | **North** | [20]{.fragment .highlight-blue fragment-index=1} | [5]{.fragment .highlight-blue fragment-index=1} | 25 | | **South** | [18]{.fragment .highlight-blue fragment-index=1} | [2]{.fragment .highlight-red fragment-index=1} | 20 | | **Total** | 38 | 7 | 45 | ::: ::: {.column width="33%"} **Table 3. Surviving enterprises** | | 0–9 | 10+ | Total | |--------|-----|-----|-------| | **North** | [100]{.fragment .highlight-blue fragment-index=2} | [25]{.fragment .highlight-blue fragment-index=2} | 125 | | **South** | [82]{.fragment .highlight-blue fragment-index=2} | [21]{.fragment .highlight-blue fragment-index=2} | 103 | | **Total** | 182 | 46 | 228 | ::: ::: *Note: Active enterprises = Enterprise births + Surviving enterprises.* ## Protecting tables with links between
response variables {#section_2_3 .backgroundStandard_bleu} :::{.enteteAvecTitre} New features of rtauargus ::: | GEO | SIZE CLASS | ACTIVE | FREQ | |:-----:|:----------:|:---------:|:----:| | North | 0-9 | birth | 20 | | North | 10+ | birth | 5 | | North | 0-9 | surviving | 100 | | North | 10+ | surviving | 25 | | North | 0-9 | active | 120 | | North | 10+ | active | 30 | | South | 0-9 | birth | 18 | | South | 10+ | birth | 2 | | ... | ... | ... | | | Total | Total | active | 275 | # Use case: Annual survey on industrial energy consumption {#chapters_3 .backgroundTitre_jaune} ## From crossings to published tables {#section_3_1 .backgroundStandard_bleu} :::{.enteteAvecTitre} Annual survey on industrial energy consumption ::: ![Extract of the French template, one row equals one cell (same as Eurostat template).](./img/extrait_melodi_eacei.png){width=100} ## Equations of response variable {#section_3_2 .backgroundStandard_bleu} :::{.enteteAvecTitre} Annual survey on industrial energy consumption ::: +------------+--------------------------------------+------+ | eq_name | eq_indicator | unit | +============+======================================+======+ | eq_1 | CONSBRT = BR_CSTP + CAR_CSTP + ... | TOE | +------------+--------------------------------------+------+ | eq_2 | BR_CSTP = BR_USQ1 + BR_USQ2 + ... | TOE | +------------+--------------------------------------+------+ | eq_6 | FACTURE = BIOR_VALA + BR_VALA + ... | EUR | +------------+--------------------------------------+------+ | eq_17 | BR_PROD = BR_THER + BR_NTHE | GWH | +------------+--------------------------------------+------+ ## Links between indicators {#section_3_3 .backgroundStandard_bleu} :::{.enteteAvecTitre} Annual survey on industrial energy consumption ::: :::{style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end;"} ![](./img/graphe_analyse_equations_eacei_rogne.png){style="margin-top: -50px !important;"} [Open interactive graph](https://inseefrlab.github.io/automatic_analysis_poster_NTTS2025/graph_eq_EACEI.html){.button} ::: ## Result {#section_3_4 .backgroundStandard_bleu} :::{.enteteAvecTitre} Annual survey on industrial energy consumption ::: | cluster | table | field | indicator | span_1 | span_2 | hrc_1 | hrc_2 | |---------|-------|-------|-----------|--------|--------|-------|-------| | alpha | T1 | 2023 | EUR | GEO | eq6 | hrc_geo13 | hrc_eq6 | | beta | T2 | 2023 | TOE | GEO | eq1_eq2_... | hrc_geo13 | hrc_eq1_eq2_... | | beta | T3 | 2023 | TOE | GEO | eq75 | hrc_geo13 | hrc_eq75 | | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | - 72 tables to publish by region (218 in the full publication) - 9 tables to protect - 6 clusters ## {#pageDeFin data-menu-title="Page finale" .unnumbered .backgroundPageFinale} :::: {.columns .coordonneesFinales} ::: {.column .gauche .coordonnees width=30%} - Clara Baudry - Methodologist - [DMGC]{.ligneBlancheApres} - [DMCSI]{.ligneBlancheApres} - clara.baudry@insee.fr - +33 (0)1 87 69 55 15 ::: ::: {.column .coordonnees .milieu width=30%} ::: ::: {.column .coordonnees .droite width=30%} ::: ::::
